seoTitle: Cree Wolfspeed News | Product Announcements, Technology Updates | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Cree Wolfspeed including new product announcements, technology breakthroughs, and industry events.

faqs.question: What types of news does BeiLuo publish about Wolfspeed?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo publishes comprehensive news about Wolfspeed including new product announcements for SiC MOSFETs, GaN HEMTs, and power modules; technology updates on wide bandgap semiconductor innovations; application success stories in EV, renewable energy, and industrial markets; industry event coverage from trade shows and conferences; supply chain updates and capacity expansion news; partnership announcements with automotive and industrial OEMs; technical webinars and training events. Stay informed about the latest developments in SiC and GaN technology.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest Wolfspeed news and product updates.

faqs.question: How can I stay updated on Wolfspeed product releases?
faqs.answer: Stay updated on Wolfspeed products: (1) BeiLuo newsletter - Subscribe for regular updates. (2) News page - Check this page regularly. (3) Product alerts - Sign up for specific product notifications. (4) Social media - Follow BeiLuo on LinkedIn and Twitter. (5) FAE contact - Your local FAE can provide updates. (6) Events - Attend webinars and trade shows. (7) Direct contact - Reach out to BeiLuo sales team. Multiple channels ensure you never miss important announcements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to BeiLuo newsletter and follow our social media for timely product updates.

faqs.question: Does BeiLuo host technical webinars about Wolfspeed products?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo hosts regular Wolfspeed technical webinars: (1) Product training - Deep dives on new devices. (2) Application workshops - EV, solar, and industrial topics. (3) Design tutorials - Gate drive, thermal, and layout guidance. (4) Case studies - Real-world application success stories. (5) Q&A sessions - Live interaction with FAE team. (6) Recordings - On-demand access to past webinars. (7) Registration - Free registration through BeiLuo website. Webinars provide valuable technical knowledge for your designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register for upcoming webinars or access recorded sessions on demand.

news.title: Wolfspeed Announces 4th Generation SiC MOSFET Technology
news.summary: Wolfspeed unveils next-generation SiC MOSFET platform delivering 20% lower Rds(on) and enhanced reliability for EV and industrial applications.
content: Wolfspeed has announced its fourth-generation SiC MOSFET technology, representing a significant advancement in wide bandgap semiconductor performance. The new Gen 4 platform delivers industry-leading performance with 20% lower specific on-resistance compared to the current Gen 3 C3M series.

The Gen 4 devices feature enhanced ruggedness with improved short-circuit withstand capability and higher avalanche energy rating. These improvements make the devices ideal for demanding automotive applications including EV traction inverters and onboard chargers.

Key specifications of the Gen 4 platform include voltage ratings from 650V to 1700V, current ratings up to 200A, and maximum junction temperature of 200°C. The devices maintain full AEC-Q101 qualification and are backed by Wolfspeed's comprehensive PPAP support.

Wolfspeed expects to begin sampling Gen 4 devices in Q3 2024, with production ramp beginning in Q1 2025. BeiLuo will have evaluation kits and samples available for qualified customers. Contact your BeiLuo FAE for early access opportunities.
news.author: BeiLuo Technical Team

faqs.question: What are the key improvements in Wolfspeed Gen 4 SiC MOSFETs?
faqs.answer: Gen 4 key improvements: (1) Rds(on) - 20% lower specific on-resistance. (2) Ruggedness - Enhanced short-circuit capability. (3) Temperature - 200°C maximum junction. (4) Avalanche - Higher avalanche energy rating. (5) Switching - Faster switching with lower losses. (6) Reliability - Improved long-term reliability. (7) Portfolio - Expanded voltage and current options. Gen 4 represents significant advancement in SiC technology.
faqs.decisionGuide: Gen 4 offers best-in-class performance; plan migration for new designs starting Q1 2025.

faqs.question: When will Gen 4 devices be available for sampling?
faqs.answer: Gen 4 availability timeline: (1) Sampling - Q3 2024 for qualified customers. (2) Evaluation kits - Available with samples. (3) Production - Q1 2025 production ramp. (4) Full portfolio - Complete range by Q3 2025. (5) Qualification - Full AEC-Q101 before production. (6) Support - BeiLuo FAE support available. (7) Migration - Pin-compatible options for easy upgrade. Contact BeiLuo for early access program.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo now to join early access program for Gen 4 sampling.

faqs.question: Will Gen 4 devices be pin-compatible with Gen 3?
faqs.answer: Gen 4 compatibility: (1) Footprint - Same package options as Gen 3. (2) Pinout - Compatible pin configuration. (3) Gate drive - Same voltage requirements. (4) Upgrade path - Easy drop-in replacement. (5) Performance - Significant improvement with same footprint. (6) Qualification - New qualification required. (7) Support - Migration support from BeiLuo FAE. Pin compatibility enables easy upgrade for existing designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Gen 4 is designed for easy migration from Gen 3; contact FAE for migration support.

news.title: Wolfspeed Expands Mohawk Valley Fab Capacity by 50%
news.summary: Wolfspeed announces major capacity expansion at world's largest SiC fabrication facility to meet growing demand from EV and renewable energy markets.
content: Wolfspeed has announced a 50% capacity expansion at its Mohawk Valley fabrication facility, the world's largest 200mm SiC wafer fab. The expansion responds to rapidly growing demand from electric vehicle and renewable energy markets.

The Mohawk Valley fab, which began production in 2022, has already reached initial capacity and is now being expanded to meet customer forecasts. The additional capacity will come online in phases throughout 2024 and 2025.

This expansion reinforces Wolfspeed's leadership position in SiC manufacturing and demonstrates the company's commitment to supporting customer growth. The vertically integrated facility handles everything from crystal growth to finished devices, ensuring quality and supply security.

BeiLuo customers benefit from this capacity expansion through improved lead times and supply assurance. Contact your BeiLuo representative to discuss long-term supply agreements and capacity allocation.
news.author: BeiLuo Supply Chain Team

faqs.question: How will the capacity expansion affect lead times?
faqs.answer: Capacity expansion impact: (1) Lead times - Gradual improvement starting Q3 2024. (2) High-volume - Priority allocation for committed programs. (3) Standard products - Improved availability. (4) Custom devices - Lead times remain longer. (5) Allocation - Based on forecast commitments. (6) Planning - Long-term agreements recommended. (7) Support - BeiLuo helps navigate allocation. Expect gradual lead time improvement as capacity ramps.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo to discuss long-term agreements for priority allocation.

faqs.question: What products will benefit most from the expansion?
faqs.answer: Products benefiting from expansion: (1) Automotive SiC - EV traction and OBC devices. (2) Popular discretes - High-volume C3M devices. (3) Power modules - CAB series modules. (4) Standard voltages - 650V, 900V, 1200V. (5) AEC-Q101 - Automotive qualified devices. (6) Popular packages - TO-247, modules. (7) New products - Gen 4 when released. High-volume standard products see greatest improvement.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard automotive and industrial products benefit most; contact BeiLuo for specific availability.

faqs.question: Does BeiLuo offer supply agreements for volume customers?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo supply agreement options: (1) LTAs - Long-term agreements with committed capacity. (2) Forecast programs - Quarterly forecast commitments. (3) Buffer stock - Strategic inventory programs. (4) Allocation - Priority during supply constraints. (5) Pricing - Competitive pricing for commitments. (6) Support - Dedicated supply chain support. (7) Flexibility - Adjustable forecasts within agreement. Contact BeiLuo sales to discuss supply agreement options.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider long-term agreements for volume programs to secure allocation and pricing.

news.title: Wolfspeed SiC Powers New Premium EV Platform
news.summary: Major automotive OEM selects Wolfspeed SiC MOSFETs for next-generation 800V EV platform, highlighting industry leadership in traction inverter applications.
content: A leading global automotive OEM has selected Wolfspeed SiC MOSFETs for its next-generation premium electric vehicle platform. The 800V architecture will utilize Wolfspeed's C3M series devices in traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters.

The design win represents one of the largest SiC deployments in the automotive industry, with projected volumes exceeding 1 million vehicles annually at peak production. Wolfspeed's automotive-qualified devices and comprehensive support were key factors in the selection.

The platform will leverage Wolfspeed's latest 1200V SiC MOSFETs with Kelvin source packages, enabling industry-leading inverter efficiency exceeding 99%. The high switching frequency capability allows for compact inverter designs with reduced weight.
BeiLuo is supporting this program with dedicated FAE resources, local inventory, and technical support. Contact BeiLuo to learn how Wolfspeed SiC can benefit your EV powertrain designs.
news.author: BeiLuo Automotive Team

faqs.question: What Wolfspeed devices are used in this EV platform?
faqs.answer: Devices in EV platform: (1) Traction inverter - C3M0032120K 1200V SiC MOSFETs. (2) OBC - C3M0065090K 900V devices. (3) DC-DC - C3M series for HV-LV conversion. (4) Packages - TO-247-4 with Kelvin source. (5) Voltage - 1200V for 800V battery. (6) Current - Various ratings for different power levels. (7) Qualification - Full AEC-Q101. Wolfspeed provides complete EV powertrain solution.
faqs.decisionGuide: Similar device families available for your EV designs; contact FAE for recommendations.

faqs.question: What efficiency improvements does SiC provide for EVs?
faqs.answer: SiC EV efficiency benefits: (1) Inverter - 99%+ vs 97% for IGBT. (2) Range - 5-10% improvement in EV range. (3) OBC - Higher efficiency charging. (4) DC-DC - Reduced losses in conversion. (5) System - Overall powertrain efficiency gain. (6) Cooling - Reduced cooling power. (7) Battery - Smaller battery for same range. SiC enables significant EV performance improvements.
faqs.decisionGuide: SiC provides 5-10% range improvement; essential for premium EV platforms.

faqs.question: Can BeiLuo support my EV development program?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo EV support capabilities: (1) FAE team - Dedicated automotive FAEs. (2) Reference designs - EV traction inverter designs. (3) Evaluation kits - Hardware for testing. (4) Samples - Automotive grade samples. (5) PPAP - Full production support. (6) Local inventory - Reduced lead times. (7) Training - Technical workshops and support. BeiLuo provides comprehensive support for EV programs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo automotive team for dedicated EV powertrain support.

news.title: Wolfspeed SiC Enables 99% Efficiency Solar Inverter
news.summary: Leading solar inverter manufacturer achieves breakthrough 99% peak efficiency using Wolfspeed SiC MOSFETs and diodes in 250kW utility-scale design.
content: A leading solar inverter manufacturer has achieved a breakthrough 99% peak efficiency in its new 250kW utility-scale string inverter using Wolfspeed SiC power devices. The design utilizes C3M series SiC MOSFETs and C3D series SiC Schottky diodes.

The high efficiency was enabled by Wolfspeed's industry-leading SiC technology, which delivers significantly lower switching losses compared to silicon IGBTs. The inverter operates at 100kHz switching frequency, enabling compact magnetics and reduced system cost.

The 1500V DC input design targets utility-scale solar installations, where every fraction of efficiency improvement translates to significant energy harvest gains over the 25-year system lifetime. The SiC-based design also offers improved reliability and reduced cooling requirements.

BeiLuo provided technical support throughout the development, including device selection guidance, gate drive recommendations, and thermal design review. Contact BeiLuo for support on your solar inverter designs.
news.author: BeiLuo Renewable Energy Team

faqs.question: Which Wolfspeed devices are used in high-efficiency solar inverters?
faqs.answer: Solar inverter devices: (1) MOSFETs - C3M series for switching. (2) Diodes - C3D series for rectification. (3) Voltage - 1200V-1700V for 1000V-1500V systems. (4) Modules - CAB series for high power. (5) Frequency - Support 50-100kHz operation. (6) Efficiency - Enable 99%+ peak efficiency. (7) Reliability - 25-year lifetime support. Wolfspeed provides complete SiC solution for solar.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use C3M MOSFETs and C3D diodes for highest efficiency solar inverters.

faqs.question: What switching frequency is optimal for SiC solar inverters?
faqs.answer: Solar inverter frequency optimization: (1) Range - 50-100kHz typical. (2) Efficiency - Higher frequency reduces magnetics loss. (3) Magnetics - Smaller size at higher frequency. (4) Losses - Balance switching vs magnetic losses. (5) EMI - Higher frequency requires filtering. (6) Sweet spot - 60-80kHz for many designs. (7) Comparison - 5-10x higher than IGBT designs. Optimize for your specific efficiency and size targets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use 50-100kHz for best balance of efficiency and magnetics size.

faqs.question: How does SiC improve solar inverter ROI?
faqs.answer: SiC solar ROI benefits: (1) Efficiency - 1-2% improvement over IGBT. (2) Energy yield - More kWh over system life. (3) Cooling - Reduced cooling costs. (4) Reliability - Longer system lifetime. (5) Size - Smaller, lighter inverters. (6) BOS - Reduced balance of system costs. (7) Payback - Faster ROI despite higher device cost. SiC maximizes solar system return on investment.
faqs.decisionGuide: SiC improves lifetime energy yield; higher device cost offset by system benefits.

news.title: Wolfspeed Showcases Latest SiC Innovations at PCIM Europe 2024
news.summary: Visit BeiLuo and Wolfspeed at PCIM Europe 2024 to see live demonstrations of Gen 4 SiC MOSFETs, new power modules, and EV reference designs.
content: Wolfspeed and BeiLuo will showcase the latest SiC innovations at PCIM Europe 2024, the leading international exhibition for power electronics. Visit us at Hall 7, Booth 321 to see live demonstrations and speak with our technical experts.

Highlights of the Wolfspeed booth will include live demonstrations of the new Gen 4 SiC MOSFET technology, showcasing 20% performance improvement over current generation devices. Visitors can see switching demonstrations comparing SiC to silicon IGBTs.

The booth will also feature a complete EV traction inverter reference design, demonstrating the system-level benefits of SiC technology. Technical experts will be available to discuss your specific application requirements and provide design guidance.

BeiLuo FAEs will be present to discuss your projects and provide local support information. Schedule a meeting with our team in advance or stop by the booth during exhibition hours. We look forward to seeing you at PCIM Europe 2024.
news.author: BeiLuo Marketing Team

faqs.question: Where and when is PCIM Europe 2024?
faqs.answer: PCIM Europe 2024 details: (1) Location - Nuremberg, Germany. (2) Dates - June 11-13, 2024. (3) Venue - Exhibition Centre Nuremberg. (4) Hours - 9:00-18:00 daily. (5) Wolfspeed booth - Hall 7, Booth 321. (6) Registration - Free online registration. (7) Conference - Technical presentations and papers. Plan your visit to see the latest power electronics innovations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register online and visit Wolfspeed booth 321 in Hall 7.

faqs.question: What products will be demonstrated at the booth?
faqs.answer: Booth demonstrations: (1) Gen 4 SiC - Latest generation devices. (2) Switching demos - Live SiC vs IGBT comparison. (3) EV inverter - Complete traction inverter reference. (4) Power modules - CAB series modules. (5) GaN devices - High-frequency applications. (6) Tools - SpeedFit calculator demonstration. (7) Support - FAE consultation available. See live demonstrations of Wolfspeed technology.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit booth for live demos and technical discussions with experts.

faqs.question: Can I schedule a meeting with BeiLuo FAEs at the show?
faqs.answer: Meeting scheduling: (1) Advance booking - Contact BeiLuo to schedule. (2) Walk-in - Visit booth during hours. (3) Duration - 30-60 minute technical meetings. (4) Topics - Application discussion, design review. (5) Follow-up - Post-show support arranged. (6) Multiple FAEs - Various expertise available. (7) Language - Multilingual support. Schedule ahead for dedicated technical discussion.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo in advance to schedule dedicated meeting with FAE team.
